markdown:
#  Retrieve a Submittal from the Recycle Bin 
##  Background 
After you delete a submittal (see [Delete a Submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/delete-a-submittal)), Procore removes the submittal from the Submittals log and archives it in the tool's Recycle Bin. See[ What is Procore's Recycle Bin?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-procores-recycle-bin)
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permission** :
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Submittals tool.
  * **Prerequisites:**
    * The submittal that you want to retrieve must be in the Recycle Bin. See [Delete a Submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/delete-a-submittal).
  * **Limitations** :
    * To give project teams the ability to restore any deleted item, the Recycle Bin cannot be emptied.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * If you want to retrieve a batch of submittals from the Recycle Bin, see [Use Bulk Actions > Retrieve in the Submittals Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/use-bulk-actions-retireve-in-the-submittals-tool).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool.
  2. Click **Recycle Bin**.   
This reveals the Recycle Bin page.   
![Submittals Recycle Tab](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4cbb5e75306b8b81ef8b05c385dbf6ce/a83df7ade360f16d8a9eaf97f5b3b1e2/submittals-recycle-tab.png?fm=webp)
  3. Locate the desired submittal in the list and click **View**.  
![View Recycled Submittal](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1c0e8c0f19067c1768732a289545e9c5/2df36a6c8a448a6dd2988fd925597acb/view-recycled-submittal.png?fm=webp)  
This reveals the recycled submittal in view mode.
  4. Click **Retrieve**.  
A banner confirms that the submittal has been restored from the Recycle Bin.


## See Also
  * [Submittals - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/permissions)
  * [What is Procore's Recycle Bin?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-procores-recycle-bin)
  * [Use Bulk Actions > Retrieve in the Submittals Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/use-bulk-actions-retireve-in-the-submittals-tool)
title: Retrieve a Submittal from the Recycle Bin
description: How to retrieve a deleted submittal from the Recycle Bin in the Project level Submittals tool.
